info.title: Kling Omni Image Task - Submit Task
info.description: Submit a Kling native omni image task via `/kling/v1/images/omni-image`. Task results may contain `images` or `series_images`.

post.description: Submit a Kling native omni image task via `/kling/v1/images/omni-image`. Task results may contain `images` or `series_images`.

400.description: Invalid request or rejected by upstream.

bearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

prompt.description:
Text prompt, can include positive and negative descriptions

- Prompts can be templated to meet different image generation needs
- Must not exceed 2500 characters
- Reference images using the <<<>>> format, e.g.: <<<image_1>>>

image_list.description:
Reference image list, passed as key:value pairs:

```json
"image_list": [{ "image": "image_url" }]
```

- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (must be accessible)
- Supported image formats: `.jpg` / `.jpeg` / `.png`
- Image file size must not exceed **10MB**, image dimensions must be at least **300px**, aspect ratio between **1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1**
- The total of reference elements and reference images must not exceed **10**
- The `image_url` value must not be empty

element_id.description: Element ID from the element library.

element_list.description:
Element reference list, configured based on element IDs in the element library

- Passed as key:value pairs:
`"element_list":[{ "element_id": 829836802793406551 }]`

- The total of reference elements and reference images must not exceed 10

result_type.description: Toggle between single image / series image output

aspect_ratio.description:
Aspect ratio of generated images (width:height)

Values: `16:9` `9:16` `1:1` `4:3` `3:4` `3:2` `2:3` `21:9` `auto`

- `auto`: intelligently selects aspect ratio based on input content

n.description:
Number of images to generate

- Range: [1, 9]
- When result_type is series, this parameter has no effect

series_amount.description:
Number of images in the generated series

Values: 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 auto

- auto: intelligently selects the number of images based on input content
- When using auto, it consumes concurrency quota equal to the actual number generated
- When result_type is single, this parameter has no effect

watermark_info.description: Whether to also generate a watermarked result.

enabled.description: true to generate watermarked result, false to not generate.

callback_url.description: Callback notification URL for this task. If configured, the server will proactively notify when the task status changes.

external_task_id.description:
Custom task ID

- User-defined task ID; providing one does not override the system-generated task ID, but the task can be queried using this ID
- Must be unique per user

error.description: Error details returned by the gateway or upstream provider.

code.description: Kling response code. 0 indicates the task has been accepted.

task_id.description: Public task ID generated by this gateway. The upstream task ID is not exposed.

external_task_id.description: External task ID provided by the client, or the public task ID injected by the gateway.
